# Assurance SLOs — Service-Level Objectives for the Research System

Use these to make the process reliable.

## Asset SLOs

```text
100% of videos have hypothesis ID, method code, metric code.
100% of videos have a declared primary action.
95% of videos pass silent first-frame test.
95% of videos have corrected captions if speech is important.
90% of educational videos include proof/example/process footage.
90% of videos have platform-native caption/title packaging.
```

## Batch SLOs

```text
Every 10-video batch includes at least:
4 feed-native tests
2 search-native videos
1 saveable checklist/template
1 sendable identity/social video
1 proof/authority teardown
1 experimental cold-audience test
```

## Measurement SLOs

```text
100% of posts logged at 24h, 72h, 7d.
80% of posts logged at 30d.
100% of experiments assigned a decision: scale, replicate, rewrite, kill, or move surface.
```

## Quality SLOs

```text
No mechanism becomes a core format from one viral event.
No clickbait hook is scaled if it lowers completion or trust.
No raw-view-only decision is allowed.
No failed post is discussed without assigning a failure gate.
```
